method_note: Direct fetching was impossible in this environment: WebFetch and curl both returned 403 for ALL hosts (agent proxy gateway policy-denies outbound CONNECT, confirmed via /__agentproxy/status and a failed fetch of example.com). Every row was therefore checked via WebSearch. VERIFIED status was unattainable; CORROBORATED is the maximum achievable grade and does not indicate any problem with the source.
sampling: Stratified sample of 20 rows, 4 per batch (agencies-ecommerce: 1,5,8,11; bali-hospitality: 19,23,28,32; clinics-wellness: 37,39,50,53; real-estate: 56,57,64,68; smb-operations: 78,82,87,96), mixing source types (forums, review sites, vendor blogs, job postings, academic study, industry studies).

details.note: Search confirms exact thread title and URL on Shopify Community; content matches (repetitive WISMO/shipping/returns questions, 'typing the same few answers all day long').

Page exists ('Client Reporting in 2026: Agent-Written, Not Dashboards') and topic matches. The 8.2-hour figure circulates in industry sources (Databox survey), but Databox states 8.2 hours per WEEK per client while the CSV evidence says per MONTH; could not confirm which framing the page itself uses. Minor periodicity discrepancy worth noting, not a fabrication signal.

G2 Gorgias review pages confirmed to exist; the exact quote 'It's priced too high compared to the rest of the market' and the $0.90-$1.00 per-AI-resolution / ticket-overage complaints are confirmed across search results.
Medium article by Kelvin Gitau confirmed at exact URL; 10-15 hours/week onboarding claim confirmed in search summary.
Exact review 'Nice place - but yep its a scam' confirmed at this URL; content matches (guests told no villa booked, other groups redirected to different locations).
TripAdvisor page for Fastboat Bali Gili confirmed at this URL; the specific review (50-minute reply to WhatsApp confirmation, customer missed the boat, no apology) confirmed in search results.
Bukit Vista article confirmed at exact URL ('Guest Communication: How Bukit Vista Simplifies Hosting 2026'); overwhelmed-owner framing and near-instant-response expectation confirmed.

Review page confirmed at exact URL; Instagram+WhatsApp booking friction with long back-and-forth conversations confirmed. Note: venue's Instagram now reportedly says 'No Reservation - Walk in Only', so the pain description may be partly stale.
ProductReview.com.au listing confirmed; unanswered Doncaster clinic phones, weeks of unanswered emails despite 24-48h auto-reply promise all confirmed in search summaries.
Trustindex page for Rejuvie Aesthetic & Dermatology confirmed; the WhatsApp 'radio silence' booking review confirmed almost verbatim.

PMC article confirmed: 'Cost of physiotherapy non-attendance at a metropolitan hospital in Australia: A time-driven activity-based costing study'; 8%/10% non-attendance rates at two clinics (2018-2021) confirmed. The A$114,827 figure was not visible in search snippets but the study, method, and setting match exactly.
InDesk page confirmed at exact URL; 48,000 UK aesthetic-clinic enquiries analysis and the 42% booking-probability drop for >1-day response confirmed.
HBR March 2011 article confirmed; 2,241 companies audited, 42-hour average response, 23% never responded, ~7x qualification advantage within 1 hour all confirmed.
WAV Group 2014 study page confirmed at exact URL; 48% of inquiries never answered and 917-minute average response confirmed.

Careers page confirmed at exact URL; duties quoted in CSV ('process and qualify incoming leads from WhatsApp, email, forms and campaigns', 'comfortable with high lead volume and repetitive follow-up work') confirmed verbatim.
Groovyweb article confirmed at exact URL; AED 919B / 275,442 transactions / 32,294 registered brokers and the shared-Bayut-enquiry first-responder dynamic all confirmed.
UK Business Forums thread confirmed at exact URL and thread ID; 8 hours on tools + 4-5 hours nightly paperwork/invoicing/quoting/certificates, ~GBP 100k turnover, ~GBP 900/week all confirmed.
Exact HN item ID confirmed for 'Ask HN: How do you handle clients who don't pay on time?'; thread content (auto-reminders, direct messages, letting payment slide) matches the CSV evidence.
DeanTek article confirmed at exact URL; $3,800/month ($45,600/year) missed-call loss figure and the 62%/78% companion stats confirmed.
Featurebase article confirmed at exact URL; 'lives in people's heads, Slack threads, old docs, private notes' and single-source-of-truth bottleneck quotes confirmed near-verbatim.
